data.title: Metropolitan Bank Holding Posts Strong Q1 2026 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Metropolitan Bank Holding ( (MCB) ) has shared an update.

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results on April 21, 2026, with net income rising to $31.4 million and diluted EPS increasing to $2.92, up from both the prior quarter and prior-year period. Net interest income climbed 28.3% year over year to $85.9 million, net interest margin expanded to 4.08%, and annualized return on average equity reached 15.4%, supported by robust loan and deposit growth.

Total loans reached $7.0 billion and deposits $7.7 billion as of March 31, 2026, reflecting double-digit year-over-year growth and broad-based deposit inflows across the bank’s verticals. The company further bolstered its balance sheet and capital flexibility through a follow-on public equity offering that raised about $186.8 million net and by increasing its quarterly dividend, while maintaining strong liquidity and a “well capitalized” regulatory status, which lowers its CRE concentration ratio and supports future organic growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (MCB) stock is a Hold with a $97.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Metropolitan Bank Holding stock, see the MCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MCB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial performance with improved balance-sheet flexibility, tempered by margin compression and uneven cash-flow durability. Technicals add support with a clear uptrend and positive momentum. Valuation is reasonable on earnings but offers limited yield, while earnings-call guidance is constructive though sensitive to rate/prepayment and credit/expense execution.

To see Spark’s full report on MCB stock, click here.

More about Metropolitan Bank Holding

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp., listed on the NYSE under ticker MCB, is the holding company for Metropolitan Commercial Bank, a New York-based commercial bank. The company focuses on commercial real estate and commercial and industrial lending, supported by diversified deposit verticals and core client relationships, and operates with capital ratios above regulatory minimums.

Average Trading Volume: 187,255

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Firefly Aerospace Updates Executive Employment and Severance Arrangements
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Forget margin or options. Here's how the pros trade FLY

The latest update is out from Firefly Aerospace, Inc. ( (FLY) ).

On April 16, 2026, Firefly Aerospace, Inc. entered into new confirmatory employment letters with executives Jason Kim, Darren Ma, and Ramon Sanchez, replacing their prior agreements and formalizing their current base salaries, bonus targets as a percentage of salary, benefit eligibility, and reaffirmed restrictive covenant commitments. On April 15, 2026, the board also approved clarifying amendments to the company’s Executive Severance Plan, and the three executives signed participation agreements, enhancing clarity and stability in Firefly’s senior leadership compensation and severance framework, which may support management retention and organizational continuity.

These steps indicate a deliberate effort by Firefly Aerospace to standardize and solidify executive employment terms, aligning incentives through defined bonus opportunities tied to base pay and reaffirmed proprietary information protections. The updated severance arrangements and explicit participation by key executives could strengthen governance structures, provide clearer expectations for stakeholders, and help the company maintain leadership continuity amid evolving industry and corporate demands.

The most recent analyst rating on (FLY) stock is a Hold with a $32.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Firefly Aerospace, Inc. stock, see the FLY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FLY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak underlying financial quality—large losses and substantial ongoing cash burn despite improved revenue and gross profit. Strong technical momentum and upbeat, high-growth 2026 guidance with a sizable backlog support the score, but valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

Voya Financial ( (VOYA) ) has provided an update.

Voya Financial disclosed preliminary assets under management for its Investment Management segment ahead of its first-quarter 2026 earnings release, reporting approximately $353 billion in AUM as of March 31, 2026. The portfolio mix included $98 billion in equity, $152 billion in public fixed income, $86 billion in private fixed income, $15 billion in alternatives, and $3 billion in money market assets.

By client type, AUM at March 31, 2026 comprised $170 billion from institutional external clients, $147 billion from retail external clients, and $37 billion from the company’s general account, all reported on a market value basis. The early disclosure provides investors and other stakeholders with an initial view of the scale and composition of Voya’s investment management franchise before full quarterly financial details are released in May 2026.

data.title: Rigel Regains Rights as Eli Lilly Ends Collaboration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Rigel ( (RIGL) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 16, 2026, Rigel Pharmaceuticals received notice that Eli Lilly is terminating their 2021 license and collaboration agreement, which will become effective June 15, 2026. The deal had granted Lilly exclusive global rights to develop and commercialize ocadusertib and other RIPK1 inhibitors for non-CNS and CNS diseases, along with joint development activities and potential milestone and royalty payments to Rigel.

Upon termination, Lilly’s rights to the licensed compounds will cease, subject to transition provisions, and Rigel expects to regain full rights to ocadusertib and related programs. Following this move and the earlier November 2025 termination of the CNS program, Rigel does not expect future milestones or royalties from the agreement and is currently evaluating the impact on its business and development strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (RIGL) stock is a Buy with a $57.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rigel stock, see the RIGL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RIGL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RIGL is a Outperform.

The score is supported most by improving fundamentals (profitability, revenue growth, stronger cash generation and balance sheet) and very low P/E valuation. Offsetting this are weak technicals (downtrend and negative momentum signals) and earnings-quality/execution risks highlighted on the earnings call, including tax-benefit-driven GAAP income and potential non-recurring growth tailwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on RIGL stock, click here.

More about Rigel

Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing and commercializing small-molecule therapies. Its pipeline includes investigational kinase inhibitors such as ocadusertib, a potent and selective RIPK1 inhibitor being developed for the treatment of various immune-inflammatory and related non-CNS and CNS diseases.

Average Trading Volume: 347,990

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $592.2M

data.description:

Bridgewater Bancshares ( (BWB) ) has provided an announcement.

Bridgewater Bancshares reported strong first-quarter 2026 results on April 21, 2026, with net income rising to $17.4 million, or $0.58 per diluted share, up from both the prior quarter and a year earlier, while adjusted EPS was $0.41. The bank expanded its net interest margin to 2.99%, improved funding costs, grew loans and core deposits, strengthened capital ratios and asset quality, and declared a June 1, 2026 cash dividend on its 5.875% Series A preferred stock, while also launching a $50 million at-the-market common stock offering to support future growth and balance-sheet efficiency.

Management highlighted that selling $208.5 million of securities for a $7.3 million gain and prepaying $97.5 million of FHLB advances enhanced balance-sheet efficiency and positioned the bank for better forward profitability. These moves, combined with rising tangible book value per share and a higher Common Equity Tier 1 ratio, underscore Bridgewater’s effort to solidify its capital base, gain market share, and deliver sustained value to shareholders amid a competitive banking environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (BWB) stock is a Buy with a $23.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bridgewater Bancshares stock, see the BWB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BWB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BWB is a Neutral.

The score is anchored by solid operating performance and a positive outlook on net interest margin expansion and growth, supported by a reasonable P/E. Offsetting this are weaker 2025 cash-flow quality/consistency, mixed near-term technical momentum, and some dilution overhang from the new ATM program.

To see Spark’s full report on BWB stock, click here.

More about Bridgewater Bancshares

Bridgewater Bancshares, Inc., based in St. Louis Park, Minn., is the parent of Bridgewater Bank and operates as a community-focused commercial bank. The company, listed on Nasdaq under ticker BWB, concentrates on relationship-based lending and deposit services, targeting growing small and midsize businesses and entrepreneurial clients in its regional markets.

data.title: Bar Harbor Bankshares Posts Strong Q1 Results, Raises Dividend
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Bar Harbor Bankshares ( (BHB) ).

On April 21, 2026, Bar Harbor Bankshares reported first-quarter 2026 GAAP net income of $13.5 million, or $0.81 per diluted share, and core earnings of $14.7 million, or $0.88 per diluted share, reflecting improved profitability over the prior quarter with a 3.54% net interest margin and a more efficient cost structure. The company’s balance sheet remained stable at $4.7 billion in assets as loan balances declined modestly due to commercial real estate payoffs, deposits increased to $3.9 billion, borrowings fell by $53.9 million, and book value and tangible book value per share both ticked higher.

The board declared an increased quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share, up $0.02 from the prior quarter and representing a higher yield based on the March 31, 2026 share price, underscoring management’s confidence in earnings strength and capital position. Directors also approved a share repurchase plan for up to 5% of outstanding common stock, subject to regulatory approval and limited to twelve months, signaling a continued focus on shareholder returns alongside disciplined growth following the Woodsville Guaranty Savings Bank loan acquisition and ongoing expansion in core lending and fee businesses.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHB) stock is a Buy with a $38.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bar Harbor Bankshares stock, see the BHB Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BHB is a Neutral.

data.title: National Health Investors Divests Skilled Nursing Portfolio to NHC
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

National Health Investors ( (NHI) ) just unveiled an update.

National Health Investors announced on April 21, 2026 that it entered a purchase and sale agreement to divest a portfolio of 32 skilled nursing facilities and three independent living facilities to current lessee National HealthCare Corporation for $560 million, with closing anticipated on July 1, 2026, subject to customary conditions. The deal, approved by a special committee of non-interested directors, is designed to cut skilled nursing exposure, boost private-pay senior housing concentration, strengthen the balance sheet by reducing leverage and increasing liquidity, and expand capital recycling capacity as the company redirects proceeds toward debt repayment and future senior housing investments.

The 35 properties generated about $39.7 million in cash lease revenue in 2025, and the expected redeployment of sale proceeds, potentially including tax-deferred reinvestment, is intended to support NHI’s long-term capital allocation strategy and governance enhancements by removing conflicts tied to overlapping relationships with NHC. Management signaled that updated financial guidance, reflecting the timing and impact of the transaction and capital redeployment, will be provided with first-quarter 2026 earnings, underscoring the transaction’s importance for the REIT’s portfolio mix and financial profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (NHI) stock is a Hold with a $86.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on National Health Investors stock, see the NHI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NHI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NHI is a Outperform.

The score is supported by constructive technical momentum and a generally solid underlying REIT cash-flow profile, reinforced by an earnings call focused on SHOP-driven growth and strong liquidity. The main constraints are reliability concerns in the latest annual financial data and a less compelling valuation (higher P/E), alongside cautious normalized FFO guidance and execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NHI stock, click here.

More about National Health Investors

National Health Investors, Inc. is a self-managed real estate investment trust focused on owning, leasing, operating and financing high-quality senior housing communities and medical facilities. Established in 1991, the Maryland-based REIT operates through Real Estate Investments and SHOP segments, with a portfolio that includes independent and assisted living facilities, entrance-fee communities, senior living campuses, skilled nursing facilities and hospitals.

data.title: Foghorn Highlights Preclinical Chromatin Oncology Advances at AACR
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Foghorn Therapeutics ( (FHTX) ).

On April 21, 2026, Foghorn Therapeutics announced preclinical data for several oncology programs presented at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting, including its selective SMARCA2 inhibitor FHD-909 and selective CBP, EP300 and ARID1B degrader candidates. The data underscore the company’s strategy of exploiting chromatin biology and synthetic lethal relationships in genetically defined cancers, reinforcing its positioning as a leader in targeting chromatin regulators and supporting the value of its Lilly partnership and broader precision-oncology pipeline.

The company also furnished an updated April 2026 investor presentation outlining a broad pipeline of first-in-class precision therapeutics, multi-billion-dollar market opportunities and its progress in advancing FHD-909 through a Phase 1 trial while moving additional degrader programs toward IND-enabling studies. With substantial non-dilutive funding from Lilly and a strengthened balance sheet after a January 2026 financing, Foghorn appears well-capitalized to progress its chromatin-focused drugs, a development that is significant for investors watching emerging approaches to “undruggable” cancer targets.

The most recent analyst rating on (FHTX) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Foghorn Therapeutics stock, see the FHTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FHTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FHTX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses, heavy cash burn, and negative equity) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors include constructive corporate updates—added financing and extended runway plus clinical progress and leadership strengthening—while valuation offers limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on FHTX stock, click here.

More about Foghorn Therapeutics

Foghorn Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on precision oncology, using its Gene Traffic Control Platform to target chromatin biology and previously undruggable epigenetic regulators. Its pipeline includes enzyme inhibitors and protein degraders such as the SMARCA2 inhibitor FHD-909 and selective CBP, EP300 and ARID1B degraders, addressing genetically defined cancers including SMARCA4- and ARID1A-mutant tumors.

The company has a major strategic collaboration with Eli Lilly, which includes a 50/50 U.S. economic split on two lead programs and tiered ex-U.S. royalties, and received $380 million in upfront consideration from that deal. As of December 31, 2025, Foghorn reported $158.9 million in cash and equivalents, supplemented by $50 million raised in January 2026, providing a cash runway into the first half of 2028 and supporting advancement of multiple oncology programs.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold
